# list_project_api_access_requests query

## 001_select_api_access_requests.sql

### SQLの概要

Projectの利用申請履歴を一覧表示するため、利用申請と審査結果を取得する。

### 利用するテーブル

- `api_access_requests`
- `projects`
- `apis`
- `api_gateway_stages`
- `api_access_reviews`
- `api_reviewers`
- `project_members`

### 引数

| 取得元テーブル | 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| <code>api_reviewers, project_members, projects</code> | <code>actor_principal_id</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>api_access_requests</code> | <code>project_id</code> | <code>UUID</code> | no |
| <code>-</code> | <code>is_hub_admin</code> | <code>Any</code> | no |
| <code>api_access_reviews</code> | <code>decision</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>api_access_requests</code> | <code>after_requested_at</code> | <code>Any</code> | no |
| <code>-</code> | <code>limit</code> | <code>Any</code> | no |

### 戻り値

| 取得元テーブル | 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| <code>api_access_requests</code> | <code>access_request_id</code> | <code>UUID</code> | no |
| <code>api_access_requests</code> | <code>project_id</code> | <code>UUID</code> | no |
| <code>api_access_requests</code> | <code>api_id</code> | <code>UUID</code> | no |
| <code>api_access_requests</code> | <code>api_stage_id</code> | <code>UUID</code> | no |
| <code>api_access_requests</code> | <code>requested_auth_mode</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>api_access_requests</code> | <code>requested_reason</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>api_access_requests</code> | <code>requested_by</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>api_access_requests</code> | <code>requested_at</code> | <code>datetime</code> | no |
| <code>apis</code> | <code>api_code</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>apis</code> | <code>api_name</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>api_gateway_stages</code> | <code>apigw_stage_name</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>api_access_reviews</code> | <code>access_review_id</code> | <code>UUID</code> | no |
| <code>api_access_reviews</code> | <code>decision</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>api_access_reviews</code> | <code>approved_auth_mode</code> | <code>str &#124; None</code> | yes |
| <code>api_access_reviews</code> | <code>reviewer_principal_id</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>api_access_reviews</code> | <code>review_comment</code> | <code>str &#124; None</code> | yes |
| <code>api_access_reviews</code> | <code>reviewed_at</code> | <code>datetime</code> | no |

### 条件

- `JOIN ON projects.project_id = api_access_requests.project_id`
- `JOIN ON apis.api_id = api_access_requests.api_id`
- `JOIN ON api_gateway_stages.api_stage_id = api_access_requests.api_stage_id`
- `JOIN ON api_access_reviews.access_request_id = api_access_requests.access_request_id`
- `JOIN ON api_reviewers.api_id = api_access_requests.api_id AND api_reviewers.reviewer_principal_id = @actor_principal_id`
- `JOIN ON project_members.project_id = projects.project_id AND project_members.member_principal_id = @actor_principal_id`
- `WHERE api_access_requests.project_id = @project_id AND (projects.owner_principal_id = @actor_principal_id OR NOT project_members.project_member_id IS NULL OR NOT api_reviewers.api_reviewer_id IS NULL OR @is_hub_admin = TRUE) AND (@decision IS NULL OR api_access_reviews.decision = @decision) AND (@after_requested_at IS NULL OR api_access_requests.requested_at < @after_requested_at)`
